title: Video demonstrating continuous calibration procedure
author: Tegtmeier Falk
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Video recording shows continuous calibration procedure, developed in the frameworks of ComTraForce project. Authors would like to acknowledge SincoTec Test Systems GmbH for providing calibration facilities and explicitly Head of Measurement Department Mike Udhe for providing technical support.
